title: Introduction to (Computational) Pathology – Introduction to pathology, the role of data and AI in pathology, and an introduction to WSIs and digital pathology
Image Processing in Pathology – MIL, segmentation, self-supervised learning, and foundation models
NLP in Pathology – Report standardization, NER, document classification, section segmentation, and mapping reports to image space
Prediction Models & Clinical Decision Making – Outcome prediction, risk stratification, Bayesian reasoning, and biostatistics
note: Target: Epidemiology, Data Analytics, Biomedical decision-making

title: Omics Modeling in Pathology – Molecular diagnostics, biomarker discovery, NGS, spatial omics, RNA-seq, and single-cell
Multimodal Modeling in Pathology – Alignment with reports, omics, radiology, dermatology, and multimodal foundation models
Implementation in Practice: The LUMC AI Pathology Plan – Examples, implementation guidelines, and deployment roadmap
